title: tribulus zeyheri subsp. zeyheri
intro: Tribulus zeyheri subsp. zeyheri is a plant species in the family Zygophyllaceae, commonly known as a type of desert or wild spinach. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including cardiovascular diseases, kidney stones, and urinary tract infections, offering benefits such as reduced blood pressure, improved kidney function, and enhanced urinary flow. Tribulus zeyheri subsp. zeyheri can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures for consumption, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
